title: Pavetta compactiflora
taxonomy: Pavetta compactiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Pavetta and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is classified as a member of the subfamily Rubioideae and is part of a larger group known as the Rubiales. Further classification includes kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, and clade Asterids. Pavetta compactiflora is also known by its synonym, Pavetta welwitschii.

The plant is believed to have antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which may aid in treating wounds and infections. Its extracts are also thought to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling.
